mapper.select:
select * from ( select rownum rnum, data.* from ( select id, pw, type, code, name, email, birth, tel, gender, addr from users where ${searchKey} like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' order by id desc ) data)
where rnum >= #{start} and rnum <= #{end}
select id from users where name =#{name} and email =#{email}

SELECT
u.id, u.type, u.code, u.name, u.email, u.birth, u.tel, u.gender, u.addr, u.joined,
c.C_KIND AS c_kind, c.C_INFO AS c_info, c.C_BOSS AS c_boss, c.C_NAME AS c_name, c.C_ADDR AS c_addr
FROM USERS u
LEFT JOIN COMPANY c ON u.id = c.c_id
WHERE u.type = #{type}

select
f.f_catagory1,
f.f_catagory2,
f.f_catagory3,
f.f_catagory4,
f.f_catagory5,
u.gender,
count(*) as category_count, sum(c.F_COUNT) as f_count, sum(c.F_PRICE) as f_price FROM CART c JOIN FURNITURE f ON c.F_CODE = f.F_CODE JOIN USERS u ON c.ID = u.ID
AND c.f_status = 'Y'
AND f.f_catagory1 = #{f_catagory1}
AND f.f_catagory2 = #{f_catagory2}
AND f.f_catagory3 = #{f_catagory3}
AND f.f_catagory4 = #{f_catagory4}
AND f.f_catagory5 = #{f_catagory5}
GROUP BY
u.gender,
f.f_catagory1,
f.f_catagory2,
f.f_catagory3,
f.f_catagory4,
f.f_catagory5,

SELECT
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE TYPE = 'user' AND JOINED = 'Y' ) AS userCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE TYPE = 'company' AND JOINED = 'Y' ) AS companyCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE TYPE = 'user' AND JOINED = 'N' ) AS notJoinedUserCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE TYPE = 'company' AND JOINED = 'N' ) AS notJoinedCompanyCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COUPON ) AS couponCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOKING ) AS bookingCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOKING WHERE B_STATUS IN ( 'pending', 'quoting', 'confirmed', 'working' ) ) AS progressCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOKING WHERE B_STATUS = 'done' ) AS doneCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOKING WHERE B_STATUS = 'cancel' ) AS cancelCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOOKING WHERE TRUNC(B_CREATEDDATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) ) AS todayBookingCount
FROM DUAL
